implementation_summary: Implemented lumyn init flag parsing for --openapi, --docs, --config, and --json.
Implemented lumyn check local config intake, source report artifacts, strict-mode exit behavior, and command-result metadata findings.
Added internal/source local OpenAPI and docs checks with repo-relative references, source hashes, surface fingerprinting, and redacted source-check artifacts.
Added CLI and internal tests for config generation, source artifact generation, concrete source findings, YAML/JSON intake, strict mode, and fail-closed invalid inputs.
